---
date: 2022-11-25
categories: [Site License]
---

# BeNotDeceived Site License

---

All Be Not Deceived content is original, unless otherwise disclosed, and therefore covered under the following Creative Commons License.

Copyright &copy; 2022 
[Be Not Deceived](https://BeNotDeceived.org)
[Creative Commons License](http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/)
![Creative Commons License](80x15.png)
